resultList.dtldesc: Welcome to the desirable Raja Ram Mohan Roy Extension in Bangalore - Central, Karnataka. We are delighted to present an exceptional 4 BHK owner residential house for sale, located on Double Road near HCG Cancer Hospital. Discover the perfect blend of comfort and convenience in this spacious house, offering an ideal living experience.Property specificationsSpanning across a super area of 4800 square feet, with a carpet area of 2700 square feet, this house is designed for spacious and comfortable living. With the provision for construction on one floor, this house is well-suited for those seeking a single-level living space. The house is unfurnished, allowing you to personalize it according to your taste. The flooring is done in cement, providing durability and a rustic charm. This house is vaastu compliant and faces the north and east directions, ensuring positive energy and abundant natural light. Additionally, being a corner property adds to the exclusivity and privacy of this house.The ground floor of the house features two bedrooms and two common bathrooms, both designed in a western style. There is a spacious living room, a normal kitchen, and a covered car shed. On the first floor, youll find two bedrooms and two bathrooms, with one bathroom attached to a bedroom and another common bathroom. Both bathrooms are western-style. The first floor also boasts a balcony attached to the living room, offering a picturesque view of the main road, facing north. Another living room and a normal kitchen complete the first floor, providing ample space for relaxation and daily activities.FacilitiesParking will never be a concern, as the house offers covered parking for three vehicles. Youll have 24-hour water supply from the corporation, ensuring uninterrupted water availability.LocalitySituated just 1 kilometer away from the Lalbagh main gate, this house enjoys a prime location. The HCG Cancer Hospital serves as an adjacent landmark, offering convenient access to medical facilities. Schools, hospitals, malls, supermarkets, banks, and ATMs are all located nearby, providing easy access to essential amenities. Public transportation, including buses and autos, is readily available, ensuring seamless commuting options.
